'''Selnia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] gambler who was once found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. She was once hired by a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who owned a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] and paid her 100 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day.
